description: R3 mutation gate pinned to the per-step snippet TOCTOU check (P1-T05) — TARGET=infra/govern/snippetverify.py, mutation_score must stay >= 0.90 (P1-T10, SV-2)
rules: TARGET and TEST_CMD are PINNED in the manifesto (a standing enforcement surface, not caller-chosen)
passes iff the test slice kills >= THRESHOLD (default 0.90) of single-token mutants of the target
PROJECT_DIR (the repo root) flows from the task-ledger; the engine sandboxes a copy and restores it
the target is a prose-clean executable core so survivors are real, killable comparisons
usage: Set PROJECT_DIR (repo root); optional THRESHOLD, MAX_MUTANTS. Output: mutate.json with {mutation_score, killed, survived}.
limitation: Pinned to the live repo target, so it has no hermetic fixture self-test; exercised by the governed drive (score 1.0) and by python3 -m pytest tests/test_snippetverify.py -q -p no:cacheprovider in the suite.
